name: @clawdstrike/tui
description: Security-aware orchestration engine for AI coding agents

scripts.build:tui-runtime:
mkdir -p ./dist ../../crates/services/hush-cli/assets/tui && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bun
// clawdstrike local runtime launcher
import { main } from "../src/cli/index.ts"
await main()
' > ./dist/cli.js && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bun
// clawdstrike installed runtime launcher
import { main } from "./src/cli/index.ts"
await main()
' > ../../crates/services/hush-cli/assets/tui/cli.js && chmod +x ./dist/cli.js ../../crates/services/hush-cli/assets/tui/cli.js
